CONFIDENT_WRONG_SPLIT._note: NON-CIRCULAR (forced-choice |margin| = independent confidence axis, a DIFFERENT task from open-gen SE). confident-wrong = wrong & |fc_margin|>=median(wrong). Expect SE BLIND to confident-wrong (~0.5) and catch ignorance (>0.5).

VERDICT: PROPER SE (NLI) aggregate AUROC=0.527 CI[0.489, 0.565]; confident-wrong-specific AUROC=0.514 CI[0.469, 0.556] (expect ~0.5=BLIND), ignorance AUROC=0.541 (expect >0.5). Report raw; confident-wrong-specific split may be underpowered at this n -- scale if it's the headline.
